name: AudioCraft (Meta MusicGen)
pricing_notes: Open source (MIT); Meta Research; GPU required for practical generation

performance.notes: 5-30s to generate 10-30 seconds of audio on A100; real-time not possible

agent_readiness.notes: Meta's open-source audio generation library. MusicGen: text-to-music generation (melody-conditioned). AudioGen: text-to-sound-effects. EnCodec: neural audio codec. MusicGen generates up to 30 seconds of high-quality music from text prompts. Available via HuggingFace Hub (multiple sizes). HuggingFace diffusers integration. Used for background music, game audio, content creation.

gotchas: Maximum generation length 30 seconds for high quality
Music quality inconsistent — sometimes repetitive or drifts
No fine-tuning support for custom genres/instruments
best_when: Generating background music for video, games, or content
Sound effect generation for games or media
Privacy-sensitive music generation (no API calls needed)
summary: AudioCraft is Meta's open-source audio generation library featuring MusicGen (text-to-music) and AudioGen (text-to-sound). MusicGen generates up to 30 seconds of high-quality music from text prompts. Multiple model sizes via HuggingFace. GPU required. Best for self-hosted music/sound generation in creative applications. Suno/Udio APIs provide better quality for production use.
